title: NoItemUpdate
body:
# No Item Updates

> **DISCLAIMER:** this mod is entirely client-side, it does not in any way change your animations server-side.

simple mod that gives the user more control over their client-side viewmodel animations.

## features
`/noitemupdates` - disables the item update/item swap animation\
`/noswingupdates` - disables the swing/attack animation

you can message me on [discord](https://discord.com/users/1041735129363644548) for any inquiries
